dashboards.name: AWS API Gateway
dashboards.description: Monitors API Gateway requests, cache hit rate, latency, 4xx/5xx errors, stage requests, and stage status.

dashboards.name: AWS Account Overview
dashboards.description: Shows account-level alert status, service health, and AWS resource distribution by region.

dashboards.name: AWS Application ELB
dashboards.description: Tracks Application Load Balancer health, connections, request volume, target response time, target groups, and HTTP errors.

dashboards.name: AWS Aurora RDS
dashboards.description: Monitors Aurora RDS CPU, storage, memory, connections, query activity, login failures, network throughput, and latency.

dashboards.name: AWS Auto Scaling
dashboards.description: Shows Auto Scaling group instance status, capacity, CPU, disk throughput, network traffic, and aggregate alerts.

dashboards.name: AWS Billing
dashboards.description: Breaks down AWS cost by operation, region, service, tag, and account, including current-month total cost.

dashboards.name: AWS Cloudfront
dashboards.description: Tracks CloudFront requests, data transfer, error requests, and 4xx/5xx error rates.

dashboards.name: AWS DynamoDB
dashboards.description: Monitors DynamoDB read/write rates, throttles, capacity usage, and get, put, query, and scan latency.

dashboards.name: AWS EBS
dashboards.description: Highlights EBS alert status, read/write latency, busy percent, and AWS service health.

dashboards.name: AWS EC2
dashboards.description: Tracks EC2 inventory, running/stopped/terminated instances, CPU, network, disk I/O, status checks, burst credits, and service limits.

dashboards.name: AWS EFS
dashboards.description: Monitors EFS throughput, IOPS, burst credit balance, permitted throughput, and alert status.

dashboards.name: AWS ELB
dashboards.description: Shows Classic ELB latency, requests per second, healthy/unhealthy hosts, spillover count, and surge queue length.

dashboards.name: AWS EventBridge
dashboards.description: Tracks EventBridge invocations, matched events, triggered rules, throttled rules, failed invocations, and dead-letter invocations.

dashboards.name: AWS Inventory
dashboards.description: Summarizes AWS resource inventory across API Gateway, Auto Scaling, CloudFront, DynamoDB, EBS, EC2, ECS, EFS, Kinesis, Lambda, and load balancers.

dashboards.name: AWS Lambda
dashboards.description: Shows Lambda invocation rate, error rate, throttle rate, function alert status, and top functions by invocations.

dashboards.name: AWS NAT Gateway
dashboards.description: Tracks NAT Gateway connections, connection attempts, idle timeouts, port allocation errors, dropped packets, throughput, and packet transmission.

dashboards.name: AWS Network ELB
dashboards.description: Monitors Network Load Balancer active/new flows, processed bytes, consumed LCUs, TCP resets, target group health, and connection errors.

dashboards.name: AWS OpenSearch
dashboards.description: Shows OpenSearch cluster status, snapshot failures, CPU, documents, storage, HTTP response codes, request volume, nodes, and JVM memory pressure.

dashboards.name: AWS RDS
dashboards.description: Tracks RDS engine inventory, storage, memory, network throughput, connections, disk queue depth, binlog disk usage, and CPU.

dashboards.name: AWS Redshift
dashboards.description: Monitors Redshift CPU, IOPS, latency, throughput, disk utilization, network throughput, database connections, and cluster/node health.

dashboards.name: AWS Route 53
dashboards.description: Tracks Route 53 health checks, endpoint status, connection time, SSL handshake time, and time to first byte.

dashboards.name: AWS S3
dashboards.description: Summarizes S3 bucket alert status, object counts, and bucket size.

dashboards.name: AWS SNS
dashboards.description: Monitors SNS message publication rate, average publish size, notification delivery rate, notification failure rate, and failed notification percentage.

dashboards.name: AWS SQS
dashboards.description: Tracks SQS message rates, queue depth, delayed/visible/not-visible messages, empty receives, message size, oldest message age, and net messages.

dashboards.name: AWS Service Limits
dashboards.description: Tracks service limit utilization for Auto Scaling, Classic ELB, EC2 instance types, IAM, SES, and VPC limits.

dashboards.name: AWS Transit Gateway
dashboards.description: Monitors Transit Gateway bytes, packets, dropped packets, and attachment traffic.

dashboards.name: AWS VPN Tunnels
dashboards.description: Shows VPN tunnel state, inbound/outbound tunnel data, total throughput, tunnel count, and alert status.

dashboards.name: AWS Workspaces
dashboards.description: Tracks WorkSpaces resources, connections, successful/failed connection activity, launch duration, in-session latency, directory health, and unhealthy WorkSpaces.

dashboards.name: SLA Overview
dashboards.description: Presents example SLA monitoring using a variety of possible metrics.

dashboards.name: Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops
dashboards.description:
Provides visualization of data obtained using the Citrix Delivery Controller OData API.

##defaultResourceProduct## can be updated on a (cloned) dashboard for XenDesktop uses.

dashboards.name: Nginx Ingress Controller
dashboards.description: Dashboard for Nginx Ingress Controller

dashboards.name: Tomcat Server
dashboards.description: Tomcat servers performance and health

dashboards.name: Azure App Services
dashboards.description: Tracks App Service and App Service Plan alert status, CPU and memory utilization, HTTP response codes, response time, throughput, and queue length.

dashboards.name: Azure Application Gateways
dashboards.description: Monitors Application Gateway connections, throughput, backend host health, backend connection time, request processing time, and failed, new, and total requests.

dashboards.name: Azure Application Insights
dashboards.description: Shows Application Insights request volume, failed requests, request duration, dependency counts, dependency failures, dependency duration, and process CPU.

dashboards.name: Azure Automation Account
dashboards.description: Summarizes Automation Account inventory, job totals, job status, and alert status.

dashboards.name: Azure Billing: Cost Management
dashboards.description: Breaks down Azure cost by region, service, subscription, and tag, including current-month total cost.

dashboards.name: Azure Blob Storage
dashboards.description: Tracks Blob Storage availability, ingress and egress, transactions, end-to-end latency, server latency, and object status.

dashboards.name: Azure Cosmos DB
dashboards.description: Monitors Cosmos DB request volume, request units, metadata requests, MongoDB requests, request charge, and resource health.

dashboards.name: Azure Event Hub
dashboards.description: Tracks Event Hub errors, archived messages, incoming and outgoing messages, throughput, server requests, and failed or successful requests.

dashboards.name: Azure Express Route Circuits
dashboards.description: Shows ExpressRoute circuit inbound and outbound bandwidth, total bandwidth, utilization, circuit count, and configured bandwidth.

dashboards.name: Azure File Storage
dashboards.description: Tracks File Storage availability, ingress and egress, transactions, end-to-end latency, server latency, and object status.

dashboards.name: Azure Firewall
dashboards.description: Monitors Firewall health, data processed, application rule hits, network rule hits, and SNAT port utilization.

dashboards.name: Azure Functions
dashboards.description: Tracks Azure Functions throughput, requests, average response time, HTTP 4xx/5xx responses, and memory working set.

dashboards.name: Azure Inventory
dashboards.description: Summarizes Azure resource inventory across App Services, Application Gateways, Automation Accounts, Functions, Redis, databases, storage, virtual machines, and scale sets.

dashboards.name: Azure Key Vault
dashboards.description: Shows Key Vault API hits, API results, API latency, availability, saturation, storage utilization, and alert status.

dashboards.name: Azure Load Balancers
dashboards.description: Monitors Load Balancer data path availability, health probe status, byte and packet transmission, SNAT connections, SNAT port usage, and SYN packets.

dashboards.name: Azure Logic Apps
dashboards.description: Tracks Logic Apps workflow runs, trigger activity, billable action and trigger executions, and connector, operation, and storage billing usage.

dashboards.name: Azure MariaDB
dashboards.description: Monitors MariaDB CPU, IO, memory, storage, network throughput, active connections, and failed connections.

dashboards.name: Azure Network Interfaces
dashboards.description: Tracks Network Interface received and sent bytes, received and sent packets, total traffic rate, and alert status.

dashboards.name: Azure PostgreSQL
dashboards.description: Shows PostgreSQL storage used, storage limit, storage utilization, compute consumption, active and failed connections, CPU, and memory.

dashboards.name: Azure Public IP Addresses
dashboards.description: Tracks Public IP DDoS trigger packets, DDoS bytes and packets received, forwarded, and dropped, plus alert status.

dashboards.name: Azure Queue Storage
dashboards.description: Tracks Queue Storage availability, ingress and egress, transactions, end-to-end latency, server latency, and object status.

dashboards.name: Azure Recovery Services
dashboards.description: Shows Recovery Services backup duration, backup status, vault count, and backup alert status.

dashboards.name: Azure Redis Cache
dashboards.description: Monitors Redis Cache CPU, cache hits and misses, keys, memory, connected clients, server load, and read/write traffic.

dashboards.name: Azure SQL Databases (DTU)
dashboards.description: Tracks Azure SQL DTU database CPU, DTU usage and limits, log write, physical data reads, storage, XTP storage, connections, deadlocks, sessions, and workers.

dashboards.name: Azure SQL Databases (Non-DTU)
dashboards.description: Tracks Azure SQL non-DTU database connections, CPU, storage, XTP storage, log writes, physical data reads, deadlocks, sessions, and workers.

dashboards.name: Azure SQL Managed Instances
dashboards.description: Monitors SQL Managed Instance IO requests, CPU, storage utilization, IO bytes read and written, reserved storage, free storage, and virtual cores.

dashboards.name: Azure Service Bus
dashboards.description: Shows Service Bus connections, CPU and memory usage, requests, messages, throttles, server errors, and dead-lettered messages.

dashboards.name: Azure Service Limits
dashboards.description: Tracks Azure service limit utilization for storage accounts, virtual machines, scale sets, cores, availability sets, application gateways, load balancers, network interfaces, network security groups, network watchers, and packet captures.

dashboards.name: Azure Storage Account
dashboards.description: Tracks Storage Account availability, ingress and egress, transactions, latency, status, and capacity used.

dashboards.name: Azure Subscription Overview
dashboards.description: Summarizes subscription availability, Advisor recommendations, announcements, resource alerts, resource health, service health, resources by region, and authentication status.

dashboards.name: Azure Table Storage
dashboards.description: Tracks Table Storage availability, ingress and egress, transactions, end-to-end latency, server latency, and object status.

dashboards.name: Azure Traffic Manager
dashboards.description: Shows Traffic Manager profile count, endpoint state, endpoint queries, profile statistics, and alert status.

dashboards.name: Azure Virtual Desktop
dashboards.description: Tracks Virtual Desktop session host and host pool status, available and total session hosts, active sessions, last heartbeat, and host pool statistics.

dashboards.name: Azure Virtual Machine Scale Sets
dashboards.description: Monitors virtual machine scale set CPU, memory, network, disk IO, scale set VM inventory, and related service limit usage.

dashboards.name: Azure Virtual Machines
dashboards.description: Tracks virtual machine network throughput, CPU, disk operations and bytes, running and stopped instance inventory, and service limit usage.

dashboards.name: Azure Virtual Machines Backup
dashboards.description: Shows virtual machine backup vaults, backup status, hours since last backup, protection status, protection state, and backup alert detail.

dashboards.name: Azure Virtual Network Gateways
dashboards.description: Monitors virtual network gateway tunnel bandwidth, ingress and egress bytes and packets, packet drops, total throughput, and alert status.

dashboards.name: AWS Overview
dashboards.description: This dashboard is focused on all AWS accounts added to LogicMonitor and is not scoped for a particular AWS account. To see statistics scoped to a particular account, view the AWS dashboards that are provisioned at the time the account was added.

dashboards.name: Azure Overview
dashboards.description: This dashboard is focused on all Azure accounts added to LogicMonitor and is not scoped for a particular Azure account. To see statistics scoped to a particular account, view the Azure dashboards that were provisioned at the time the account was added.

dashboards.name: GCP Overview
dashboards.description: This dashboard is focused on all GCP accounts added to LogicMonitor and is not scoped for a particular GCP account. To see statistics scoped to a particular account, view the GCP dashboards that were provisioned at the time the account was added.

dashboards.name: Oracle MySQL
dashboards.description:
For use with newer Oracle_MySQL* LogicModules

Dashboard version 2026.001

dashboards.name: GCP App Engine
dashboards.description: Tracks App Engine alert status, service CPU usage, and HTTP 4xx/5xx errors.

dashboards.name: GCP Billing
dashboards.description: Breaks down GCP cost by project, service, and operation, including current-month total cost.

dashboards.name: GCP Cloud Functions
dashboards.description: Tracks Cloud Functions alert status, executions, network egress, and function statistics.

dashboards.name: GCP Cloud SQL
dashboards.description: Monitors Cloud SQL alerts, connections, uptime, disk IOPS, MySQL queries, network throughput, PostgreSQL transactions, CPU, memory, and disk utilization.

dashboards.name: GCP Cloud Storage
dashboards.description: Shows Cloud Storage alert status, bucket object counts, bucket size, bucket throughput, metadata request traffic, and total objects.

dashboards.name: GCP Compute Engine
dashboards.description: Summarizes Compute Engine regional instance distribution, inventory, alerts, CPU utilization, total IOPS, and total throughput.

dashboards.name: GCP Project Overview
dashboards.description: Summarizes GCP project inventory, alerts, service health, resources by region, and coverage for App Engine, Cloud Functions, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Compute Engine, and VPN gateways.

dashboards.name: GCP VPN Tunnels
dashboards.description: Tracks VPN tunnel status, total throughput, ingress and egress, sent and received packets, and dropped packets.

dashboards.description: Dashboard token ##defaultResourceGroup## should target the resource group containing UCS resources.

dashboards.description: Dashboard for Kubernetes Pod Disruption Budget

dashboards.description: Status and critical metrics of your LogicMonitor Collectors.

dashboards.name: Aruba Wireless
dashboards.description: This dashboard is a hybrid, with modules from the Aruba wireless and switching suites. To lock this down to just wireless controller(s), create a dynamic group with just your wireless resources, and point the token at that group.

dashboards.name: Cisco ASA
dashboards.description: Due to the generic nature of the Cisco LogicModule coverage, it's recommended to create a "Devices by Type/Cisco ASA" or other dynamic group and to target that group with the ##defaultResourceGroup## token.

dashboards.description:

hasCategory("PaloAlto")

dashboards.description: This dashboard is intended to monitor a Slack instance from a LogicMonitor collector, added as a distinct resource to the resource tree; some customization may be required in other circumstances.
